diffs.name: Meeting Intelligence
diffs.description: Turn recordings into structured notes, auto-update contact pages, catch missed commitments
diffs.methodology: Records meetings, transcribes with Granola, extracts action items, updates contact vault pages, flags uncommitted deliverables. Role-adaptive: AEs get deal stage updates, PMs get feature requests, CSMs get renewal risk signals.

diffs.name: Deal Intelligence
diffs.description: Portfolio health monitoring, transcript-based coaching, continuous account enrichment
diffs.methodology: Scans deal notes, extracts champion strength, budget signals, competitive threats. Generates coaching suggestions for deal review prep. Role-adaptive: Field reps get territory health, SEs get technical blockers, managers get pipeline risk.

diffs.name: Relationship Compounding
diffs.description: Automatic cross-referencing, context-aware message drafting, stakeholder updates from real activity
diffs.methodology: Links contact mentions across vault, surfaces shared history before calls, drafts follow-ups with project context. Role-adaptive: CSMs get renewal touchpoints, AEs get upsell timing, recruiters get candidate warmth scores.

diffs.name: Weekly Operating Rhythm
diffs.description: Deal-first planning, parallel intel pipelines, pillar balance tracking
diffs.methodology: Monday review generates deal-first weekly plan, not task lists. Parallel agents run intel loops (competitive news, product updates, exec mentions). Tracks time across strategic pillars. Role-adaptive: PMs get feature velocity, ops get process health, execs get team balance.

diffs.name: Accountability & Cracks Detection
diffs.description: Scan for slipped commitments, project health dashboards, career evidence capture
diffs.methodology: Daily scan for commitments made in meetings vs. delivered. Flags cracks (unmet promises, delayed follow-ups). Auto-captures wins for performance reviews. Role-adaptive: ICs get personal accountability, managers get team health, execs get organizational risk.

diffs.name: Thought Leadership Pipeline
diffs.description: Podcast-to-social, competitive intel scanning, 22-agent content review
diffs.methodology: Transcribes podcast appearances, extracts quotable insights, generates LinkedIn posts. Scans competitor content for positioning gaps. 22-agent team reviews drafts for clarity, evidence, narrative. Role-adaptive: Founders get brand positioning, PMs get product narrative, sales leaders get battlecards.

diffs.name: Self-Improving System
diffs.description: Learning capture, pattern detection, mistake prevention, usage analytics
diffs.methodology: Logs every Dex interaction, clusters similar queries, surfaces patterns ('you ask about deal X every Monday'). Flags repeated mistakes, suggests workflow improvements. Role-adaptive: Power users get efficiency gains, new users get guided setup, admins get adoption metrics.
